recommendations.title: Close
recommendations.overview: A counter-terrorism expert takes a job protecting a young heiress. After an attempted kidnapping puts both of their lives in danger, they must flee.

recommendations.title: Sweet Girl
recommendations.overview: A man vows to bring justice to those responsible for his wife's death while protecting the only family he has left, his daughter.

recommendations.title: Falcon Rising
recommendations.overview: Chapman is an ex-marine in Brazil's slums, battling the yakuza outfit who attacked his sister and left her for dead.

recommendations.title: Crows Zero
recommendations.overview: The students of Suzuran High compete for the King of School title. An ex-graduate yakuza is sent to kill the son of a criminal group, but he can't make himself do it as he reminds him of his youth.

recommendations.title: Lone Wolf and Cub: Baby Cart to Hades
recommendations.overview: Ogami Itto volunteers to be tortured by Yakuza in order to save a prostitute and is hired by their leader to kill an evil chamberlain.

recommendations.title: Ek Villain
recommendations.overview: An ex-gangster re-enters the world of violence after his wife is murdered by a serial killer.

recommendations.title: Ferry 2
recommendations.overview: After losing his drug empire, Ferry Bouman has found a measure of peace away from Brabant's criminal underworld — until his past catches up to him.

recommendations.title: The Street Fighter
recommendations.overview: Takuma Tsurugi takes on the government, the police, the mafia and an international ring of kidnappers who aim to dispossess a beautiful young heiress of her millions.

recommendations.title: The Outsider
recommendations.overview: A former American G.I. joins a yakuza family after his release from prison in post-World War II Osaka.

recommendations.title: Sonatine
recommendations.overview: Murakawa, an aging Tokyo yakuza tiring of gangster life, is sent by his boss to Okinawa along with a few of his henchmen to help end a gang war, supposedly as mediators between two warring clans. He finds that the dispute between the clans is insigni
